title: Navigate between primary pages using desktop NavBar and logo
description: Verifies a visitor can use the top navigation and logo to move between key pages and return to the homepage successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the About navigation link
Click the Products navigation link
Click the brand logo
Verify the user lands on the homepage

title: Prospect evaluates catalog and returns to product list
description: Verifies a prospect can browse the product grid, view hover tooltip, open a product detail, and return to the catalog successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Hover over a product card
Click the product acquisition call-to-action on that card
Click the abort-and-return control
Verify the product catalog grid is displayed

title: Enter credentials and toggle session persistence on Command Gateway
description: Verifies an operative can enter an ID and passphrase, toggle session persistence, and invoke the authorize action without page errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the operative ID field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the security passphrase field
Click the remember terminal session checkbox
Submit the authorize access action
Verify the login view remains usable with no visible error state or broken layout

title: Use mobile hamburger menu to navigate to Contact and close overlay
description: Verifies a mobile visitor can open the hamburger overlay menu, navigate to Contact, and the overlay closes after navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Click the hamburger menu icon
Click the Contact link in the overlay menu
Verify the user lands on the contact page
Verify the mobile navigation overlay is closed

title: Return to catalog from product detail
description: Verifies a user can exit a product detail page and return to the product catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Click the product acquisition call-to-action on a product card
Click the abort-and-return control
Verify the product catalog grid is displayed

title: Enter Command Gateway via CLIENT LOGIN from NavBar
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the Command Gateway login screen from the persistent navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the client login entry in the navigation bar
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Discover all products in catalog grid
description: Verifies the catalog page renders a complete grid of products for discovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Verify 11 product cards are displayed

title: Product detail shows required tactical content blocks
description: Verifies the product detail page displays system identification, restricted badge, specs table, analysis block, and acquisition action.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Click the product acquisition call-to-action on a product card
Verify the product detail shows a system ID, a restricted badge, a specifications table, and a terminal analysis block
Verify a confirm acquisition action is present

title: Open a product detail page from the catalog
description: Verifies selecting a product from the catalog navigates to a product detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Click the product acquisition call-to-action on a product card
Verify a product detail view is displayed

title: Navigate from login to clearance reset and to operative registration
description: Verifies a user can reach both the clearance reset and clearance request screens from the login page via in-app navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Click the reset clearance link
Click the return to command gateway link
Click the initiate clearance request link
Verify the operative registration view is displayed

title: Contact-to-gateway via Partner Portal authorize access link
description: Verifies a partner can navigate from the contact page Partner Portal section to the command gateway login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Click the authorize access link in the Partner Portal section
Verify the command gateway login screen is displayed

title: View terminal tooltip on product card hover
description: Verifies hovering a product card reveals a terminal-style tooltip with product information.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Hover over a product card
Verify a terminal-style tooltip with product details is displayed

title: Request clearance with all required registration fields completed
description: Verifies an operative can complete the signup form with valid values and submit a clearance request via client-side interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill OpName-Alpha into the operative name field
Fill req-id-alpha into the requested ID field
Fill Agency Unit 7 into the affiliation or agency field
Select a clearance level from the clearance dropdown
Fill Passphrase-Alpha1! into the security passphrase field
Fill Passphrase-Alpha1! into the verify passphrase field
Submit the clearance request
Verify the page remains on the signup view with the form still accessible after submission

title: Encrypted contact form accepts input and transmits client-side
description: Verifies a partner can complete all encrypted contact fields, select a clearance level, and initiate transmit client-side.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Operative Name into the operative name field
Fill a Sur/Code Name into the code name field
Fill an Organization/Agency into the organization field
Select a security clearance level from the clearance dropdown
Fill a message into the encrypted payload field
Submit the transmit action
Verify a client-side transmit confirmation state is visible

title: Block submission when verify passphrase mismatches and allow correction
description: Verifies mismatched passphrases trigger client-side validation and that correcting the verify passphrase allows the request to be submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill OpName-Bravo into the operative name field
Fill req-id-bravo into the requested ID field
Fill Agency Unit 9 into the affiliation or agency field
Select a clearance level from the clearance dropdown
Fill Passphrase-Bravo1! into the security passphrase field
Fill Passphrase-Bravo2! into the verify passphrase field
Submit the clearance request
Verify a passphrase mismatch validation error is visible
Fill Passphrase-Bravo1! into the verify passphrase field
Submit the clearance request
Verify the mismatch validation error is no longer visible

title: Red alert mode appears when hovering acquisition call-to-action
description: Verifies the acquisition hover state triggers a red alert mode in the tooltip for the hovered product.

steps.description: Navigate to /products
Hover over the product acquisition call-to-action on a product card
Verify the terminal tooltip switches into a red alert state

title: Transmit a clearance reset request with a valid email format
description: Verifies a user can enter a valid email format and invoke the clearance reset transmit action without validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill operative.alpha@example.com into the email or operative ID field
Submit the transmit reset code action
Verify no email format validation error is visible

title: Show validation for invalid email format and allow retry
description: Verifies invalid email input triggers a client-side validation error and that correcting the email clears the error on submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill invalid-email into the email or operative ID field
Submit the transmit reset code action
Verify an email format validation error is visible
Fill operative.bravo@example.com into the email or operative ID field
Submit the transmit reset code action
Verify the email format validation error is no longer visible

title: View services offerings list
description: Verifies a buyer can open the services page and see service offering cards with accompanying imagery.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Scroll through the services content
Verify service offering cards are displayed
Verify service-related imagery is displayed

title: Return to Command Gateway from signup
description: Verifies a user can navigate back to the Command Gateway login from the registration screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Click the return to command gateway action
Verify the command gateway login view is displayed

title: Browse career page content sections
description: Verifies a recruit can load the career page and see the hero/CTA plus infrastructure and tactical division sections rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /career
Scroll to the infrastructure feature cards section
Scroll to the tactical division cards section
Verify the career hero section and call-to-action are displayed
Verify infrastructure feature cards and tactical division cards are displayed

title: View news and press releases list
description: Verifies a buyer can open the news page and see a list of news items with associated images.

steps.description: Navigate to /news
Scroll through the news list
Verify news or press release items are displayed
Verify news item images are displayed

title: Return to Command Gateway from clearance reset
description: Verifies a user can navigate back to the login screen from the clearance reset screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Click the return to command gateway link
Verify the command gateway login view is displayed

title: View About Us story, stats, and doctrine cards
description: Verifies a prospect can load the About Us page and see company stats plus the three core doctrine cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /about-us
Scroll to the stats section
Scroll to the core doctrine cards section
Verify the company hero and stats are displayed
Verify the core doctrine cards are displayed

title: Footer branding visible on homepage
description: Verifies a user can reach the page footer on the homepage and see the footer branding and copyright information displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify the footer is displayed with the site branding
Verify the footer shows copyright information

title: Swipe/drag horizontally through Core Solutions cards
description: Verifies a visitor can horizontally scroll through the Core Solutions cards using drag/swipe input and see the content move.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the Core Solutions horizontal cards section
Press ArrowRight repeatedly while the horizontal scroller is focused
Verify different solution cards can be brought into view in the horizontal scroller

title: Home hero animation responds to scroll parallax and fade-out
description: Verifies the homepage hero performs its reveal and responds to scrolling with a parallax/fade interaction visible to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero section to finish its initial reveal animation
Scroll down to trigger the hero scroll interaction
Verify the hero section shows a visible scroll-driven transition (parallax and/or fade)

title: Access technical specs from About Us
description: Verifies a prospect can click the technical specs call-to-action and see additional technical information surface on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /about-us
Scroll to the leadership and technology section
Click the button to view technical specs
Verify technical specifications content is displayed

title: Homepage hero CTA buttons provide interaction feedback
description: Verifies the hero CTA buttons can be interacted with and provide visible feedback without requiring navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Request Proposal call-to-action button
Click the Explore Solutions call-to-action button
Verify the hero call-to-action controls remain visible and interactive after clicks

title: Reveal job listing hover action
description: Verifies a candidate can hover a job listing and the hidden upload action is revealed.

steps.description: Navigate to /career
Scroll to the job listings section
Hover over a job listing item
Verify the job listing reveals an upload action prompt

title: Hovering a Core Solutions card changes its visual state
description: Verifies hovering a Core Solutions card produces a visible hover state change on the card content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the Core Solutions horizontal cards section
Move the pointer over a solution card
Verify the hovered solution card shows a visible hover state change

title: Footer quick links are interactive on hover and click
description: Verifies a user can interact with footer quick links by hovering and clicking a placeholder link without leaving the current page context unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Move the pointer over a footer quick link
Click the footer Partner Portal link
Verify the footer remains visible after the interaction
Verify the user remains on the homepage

title: Rotating ring animations render on About Us
description: Verifies the About Us page shows the rotating ring animation elements behind the imagery.

steps.description: Navigate to /about-us
Scroll to the imagery area with ring visuals
Verify rotating ring visual elements are displayed
